summary: Iteration 19: Testing new features - Agency admin sticky header, theme toggle, notifications, and client import. All features working. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All visual features verified.

integration_issues.issue: data-testid attributes not accessible via Playwright standard selectors in React Native Web. Had to use position-based clicking or text-based selectors.

agency_admin_header_at_top.details: Header is sticky at TOP of page with LogiRent logo, agency name badge (LogiRent Geneva), theme toggle (sun icon), notification bell, logout button. Tab navigation (Accueil, Réserver, Réservations, Véhicules, Clients) appears below header.

agency_admin_tab_navigation.details: All 5 tabs visible and navigable. Active tab has underline indicator.

agency_theme_toggle.details: Sun/moon icon visible in header top-right. Clicking toggles between dark and light theme.

agency_notification_bell.details: Bell icon visible in header. Clicking opens notification panel modal with 'Notifications' title, 'Tout lire' button, and notification list.

import_clients_button.details: Green cloud-upload button visible on Clients page next to search bar. Clicking opens 'Importer des clients' modal.

import_modal_content.details: Modal shows: 'Formats acceptés' (Excel, CSV, ZIP with photos), 'Colonnes Excel' (nom, email, téléphone, adresse, photo), 'Import avec photos' instructions, and 'Choisir un fichier' upload button.

backend_import_users_csv.details: POST /api/admin/import-users accepts CSV files and returns created/skipped counts.

backend_import_users_zip.details: POST /api/admin/import-users accepts ZIP files with CSV + photos and returns created/skipped/photos_matched counts.

backend_notifications.details: GET /api/notifications, GET /api/notifications/unread-count, PUT /api/notifications/read-all all working correctly.

client_app_theme_toggle.details: Client app shows sun icon for theme toggle in top navigation bar.

client_app_notification_bell.details: Client app shows bell icon for notifications in top navigation bar.

critical_code_review_comments: React Native Web testID/data-testid attributes may not be accessible via standard DOM queries in automated testing. Consider adding accessible aria-labels or using native DOM attributes.
seed_data_creation: Created test import users via CSV and ZIP upload during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) Agency admin header renders at TOP with sticky positioning, showing LogiRent logo, agency badge, theme toggle, notification bell, logout, and tab navigation. 2) Theme toggle switches between dark/light mode. 3) Notification panel opens from bell click. 4) Import clients button (green cloud icon) opens modal with format info and upload button. 5) Backend /api/admin/import-users endpoint accepts .xlsx, .csv, or .zip files and processes them correctly. 6) Client app has theme toggle and notification bell in nav bar. Note: data-testid selectors not directly accessible in Playwright for React Native Web - use text or coordinate-based clicks.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All features working as specified.
